attributes.action: Make mandatory eye tests for all road users irrespective of their age.
attributes.additional_details: Pass legislation to bring about this suggested change,
attributes.background: Ensure that all drivers using the roads meet the mandatory vision requirements. Currently. there is no method of ensuring all driver meet the mandatory vision requirements.

rejection.details:
Your petition asks for the same thing as one we already have open on our site. You may wish to sign this petition instead:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747216
